description:
Toolchain packages (go-toolchain, rust-toolchain, buck2-toolchain, python-toolchain, js-toolchain, solidity-toolchain) all duplicate identical mkToolchain logic and redundant component maps that mirror data.json keys. This epic centralizes the builder into lib/ and reduces each toolchain default.nix to a one-liner.

## Steps

1. Add `buildToolchain` helper to `lib/default.nix`
2. Migrate all 6 toolchain packages to use the new helper
3. Update CLAUDE.md docs to document the toolchain helper pattern

## Dependency graph

```mermaid
graph LR
    tb-1["Add buildToolchain to lib"] --> tb-2["Migrate toolchain packages"]
    tb-2 --> tb-3["Update docs"]
```
title: Simplify toolchain packages: centralize mkToolchain, remove redundant component maps
